overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character transitioning from horseback to walking along a rocky lakeshore at golden hour, approaching and stepping onto a wooden dock extending into calm water surrounded by mountains.

events.description: character dismounts from horse and transitions to walking on foot

agents.ego_description: dismounting from horse and beginning to walk along the lakeshore path

entered.detail: large mountain with rocky slopes dominating the background skyline
calm reflective water surface extending to the horizon
pebble and stone covered ground along the water's edge
weathered wooden pier structure extending into the lake
tall green reeds and grasses growing along the shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a brief view of the character on horseback before dismounting to walk. The scene is set at golden hour along a lakeshore with a prominent mountain in the background and a wooden dock visible in the distance across rocky terrain.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline toward the distant wooden dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks continuously along the rocky lakeshore, with the wooden dock gradually approaching from the distance. The mountain remains prominent in the background while tall vegetation lines the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over lake water

events.description: ground surface transitions from rocky shore to grassy bank
character steps from grassy ground onto wooden dock structure

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and stepping onto the wooden dock extending over the water

entered.detail: grassy area with mixed vegetation leading to the dock entrance
small wooden rowboat moored alongside the dock

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the rocky shore onto a grassy bank approaching the dock, then steps onto the wooden structure. A small boat is visible moored to the left as the character walks out over the calm water, with mountains surrounding the lake in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a horseback arrival along a rocky lakeshore to a walk out onto a wooden dock over calm water. It begins with the character dismounting their horse at golden hour, with a prominent mountain looming in the background and a distant dock visible across the terrain. As the character walks forward, the camera tracks along the rocky shore past tall vegetation on the left, bringing the wooden structure into closer focus. The scene then shifts from the rocky ground to a grassy bank before the character steps onto the wooden dock. Finally, the camera moves past a small moored boat and out over the still water, revealing a panoramic view of the surrounding mountains.
